description: Wraps a set of comparison cards for plans, options, or before/after choices.
uiDescription: Renders side-by-side comparison panels that emphasize differences between a small number of options.
generationNotes: Use this as the parent around compareCard blocks.
Keep the number of cards small so each option remains readable.
Use highlight on the preferred option only.
useCases: Plan comparison, option selection, before-and-after framing, and package overviews.
Avoid using it for more than three options or dense technical specs.

fewShotExamples.markdown:
::::compareCards{columns="2"}
:::compareCard{title="Starter" badge="For individuals" highlight="false"}
- 3 projects
- Shared templates
- Email support
:::
:::compareCard{title="Team" badge="Most popular" highlight="true"}
- Unlimited projects
- Role-based access
- Priority support
:::
::::
